W

write(Object...) - Method in class basicFiles.files.BaseFile
Writes data to the file, overwriting existing content.
write(Object...) - Method in class basicFiles.files.BinaryFile
 
write(Object...) - Method in class basicFiles.files.Folder
Recursively writes all unsynced children to the disk.
write(Object...) - Method in class basicFiles.files.medias.Audio
Exports the accumulated buffer data into a physical WAVE file on disk.
write(Object...) - Method in class basicFiles.files.medias.Image
Writes a BufferedImage to disk using the defined format.
write(Object...) - Method in class basicFiles.files.TabularFile
Writes the current in-memory content to the physical file.
write(Object...) - Method in class basicFiles.files.TextFile
Replaces the current file content with the provided arguments and writes to disk.
write(Object...) - Method in class bigFiles.files.BigBinaryFile
Overwrites the file with the provided serializable objects.
write(Object...) - Method in class bigFiles.files.BigFile
Overwrites the file with the provided data.
write(Object...) - Method in class bigFiles.files.BigFolder
Recursively saves all modified children to the disk.
write(Object...) - Method in class bigFiles.files.BigTabularFile
Overwrites the file with the provided data.
write(Object...) - Method in class bigFiles.files.BigTextFile
Overwrites the file with the provided arguments.
write(Object...) - Method in class bigFiles.files.medias.BigAudio
Writes the audio file from the accumulated buffer content.
write(Object...) - Method in class bigFiles.files.medias.BigImage
